sections.paragraph: ἐϰϰαϑαίρω [s. καθαρός] ‘remove in interest of purification’, of inward purifying: clear out 1 Cor 5:7; remove in complex imagery of certain household objects that are not subjects of refined conversation and with retroactive reference (2 Ti 1:14-19) to reprehensible behavior 2 Ti 2:21.
